steps.title: Match the combination
steps.content: The passage calls the metal and organic materials a juxtaposition common in contemporary Japanese architecture. The blank needs a noun for combining sleek contemporary elements with traditional organic materials in one design.

steps.title: Choose the blending noun
steps.content: Choice A means naming or assigning. Choice B means examination. Choice C means spreading or dispersal. The remaining choice means combining distinct parts into a unified whole, which fits the design trend. The answer is D.
